reviews.comment:
Excelente atención playeros de estación servicio. Además confitería completa y oficinas del A.C.A. Sabado 8/2/25: hay un Full ahora. Para el recreo: es gratis para socios, cobran por familiar y por invitado. Mesas con bancos, parrillas y piletas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the gas station. Also, a full-service café and ACA offices. Saturday, February 8, 2025: it's a full service station now. For recreation: it's free for members, they charge per family member and per guest. Tables with benches, grills, and swimming pools.

reviews.comment:
Voy por lo malo primero y por lo que bajo una estrella. Llego, cola de 4 vehículos, una sola bomba con atención. Quise quedarme en la cola porque pensé que estaba solo quien atendía para no hacer lío. Llega otro se pone atrás mio, llega otro más y en vez de seguir la cola, se pone en la primer bomba pegada al Shop y ahí sale otro playero de la oficina...  no sé,  voy a creer que estaba en su horario de descanso o desayuno no se... porque eran las 9 y algo de la mañana pero bueno. Fuera de eso, el resto estuvo bien. Las mujeres que atienden el Full muy atentas y todo bien, se ve que es muy buscado en la zona porque llegamos y se empezó a llenar. También use el inflador y debo resaltar que estaba limpio, generalmente uno lo toma y se llena de grasa o mugre en la mayoria de las estaciones, pero el de esta estación estaba limpio y se agradece mucho.

(Translated by Google)
I'll start with the bad points and the reason I'm deducting a star. I arrived to find a line of four vehicles and only one pump with staff. I wanted to stay in line because I thought it was just the attendant working, so I wouldn't cause any trouble. Another attendant arrived and got in behind me, then another arrived and instead of continuing in line, went to the first pump next to the convenience store, and then another attendant came out of the office... I don't know, I'm going to assume he was on his break or lunch break, I don't know... because it was around 9:00 in the morning, but oh well. Aside from that, everything else was fine. The women working at the Full service station were very attentive and everything was good; it seems to be a popular spot in the area because we arrived and it started filling up. I also used the tire inflator, and I must say it was clean. Usually, you pick one up and it's covered in grease or grime at most stations, but the one at this station was clean, which was much appreciated.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBc3VpQ2xnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hola! Quiero destacar y agradecer la amabilidad de los empleados tanto de la playa como del autoservicio. Pasé el domingo pasado (26/01) a las 20hs aprox. Cargué nafta en el surtidor que está cerca de la puerta, el muchacho super amable. Luego de cargar no me arrancaba el auto y él muy amablemente me ayudó a empujarlo a un lugar más adelante, me dijo que me quedara tranquila que ahí no molestaba. Luego entramos con mi nene a merendar y la chica super amorosa y atenta (creo que en el ticket decía Claudia). Salimos y el auto tampoco arrancaba, y los 3 chicos que estaban en la playa en ese momento (incluído el que me había atendido primero) sin que les diga nada se ofrecieron a ayudarme. Pudieron arrancar el auto!
La verdad es lindo destacar estos gestos porque son cosas que parecen simples o comunes pero en realidad hablan no sólo de buenos empleados sino de buenas personas, que es lo principal. Muchas gracias 💕

(Translated by Google)
Hi! I want to highlight and thank the kindness of the employees both at the gas station and the drive-thru. I stopped by last Sunday (January 26th) around 8 pm. I filled up at the pump near the entrance; the attendant was incredibly friendly. After filling up, my car wouldn't start, and he very kindly helped me push it to a spot further down the road. He told me not to worry, that it wouldn't be in the way. Then my son and I went inside for a snack, and the attendant was incredibly kind and attentive (I think her name was Claudia on the receipt). We came back out, and the car still wouldn't start, but the three guys who were at the gas station at that moment (including the one who had helped me first) offered to help without me even saying a word. They got the car started!
It's really nice to highlight these gestures because they seem like simple or commonplace things, but they truly speak not only of good employees but also of good people, which is the most important thing. Thank you so much! 💕
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBekl6ZUlREAE
